name: node-p-map
title: node-p-map
description:
Map over promises concurrently
Useful when you need to run promise-returning & async functions multiple times
with different inputs concurrently.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-p-map because Map over promises concurrently.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-p-map as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-p-map with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-p-map --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
